# terrible_community_postgresql_postgresql_schema (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the schema to add or remove.

### Optional

- `cascade_drop` (Boolean) Drop schema with CASCADE to remove child objects.
- `comment` (String) Sets a comment on the schema. To reset the comment, pass an empty string.
- `login_db` (String) Name of the database to connect to and add or remove the schema. The `db` alias is deprecated and will be removed in version 5.0.0.
- `owner` (String) Name of the role to set as owner of the schema.
- `session_role` (String) Switch to session_role after connecting. The specified session_role must be a role that the current login_user is a member of. Permissions checking for SQL commands is carried out as though the session_role were the one that had logged in originally.
- `state` (String) The schema state.
- `trust_input` (Boolean) If `false`, check whether values of parameters *schema*, *owner*, *session_role* are potentially dangerous. It makes sense to use `false` only when SQL injections via the parameters are possible.

### Read-Only

- `queries` (String) List of executed queries.
- `schema` (String) Name of the schema.
